  • Overview
  • Tree
  • Index
  • Search
  • Help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    AbstractDAO<T>
    Generic DAO Class meant to be extended for other DAO Classes
    AppUtility
    Provides utility for configuring JButton settings and generating a table from a List of Objects using Reflection
    Bill
    Created and inserted into the Log Table upon placing an order
    BillBL
    Class created to be used on Bill Objects (Records)
    BillDAO
    DAO Class for Bill Objects (Records)
    BillPanel
    Panel for all viewing Order Bills
    Client
    Represents the Client Object in the Project
    ClientBL
    Class created to be used on Client Objects
    ClientDAO
    DAO Class for Client Objects
    ClientPanel
    Panel for viewing, adding, updating and deleting Clients
    ConnectionHandler
    Creates Connection with the DB
    Controller
    Controller Class to link Presentation to the BusinessLogic
    Main
    Starts App
    MainFrame
    The Main Menu Class of the UI
    Order
    Represents the Order Object in the Project
    OrderBL
    Class created to be used on Order Objects
    OrderDAO
    DAO Class for Order Objects capable of only inserting into DB
    OrderPanel
    Panel for placing Orders
    Product
    Represents the Product Object in the Project
    ProductBL
    Class created to be used on Product Objects
    ProductDAO
    DAO Class for Product Objects
    ProductPanel
    Panel for viewing, adding, updating and deleting Products
    UnderStockException
    Thrown when trying to insert orders with a product quantity exceeding product stock
